autor: He will not judge us as if we had no difficulties to overcome. What matters is the sincerity and perseverance of our will to overcome them.
explicacao: Citação de He will not judge us as if we had no difficulties to overcome. What matters is the sincerity and perseverance of our will to overcome them. sobre temas ligados a reflexao. “God knows our situation” articula reflexao, c-s-lewis, knows em registro de reflexao, com relevância para contextos como reflexao.
